creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

games/doomsday started to crash due to a problem with SDL2, see [1]

The problem was already fixed upstream [2] and will be present in the next SDL release, but while we wait for the new version maybe we could have it patched in the ports tree?


[1] - https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=277741
[2] - https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL/commit/8f860b36983152998dc212a294325dcff26bb6f2
